title: UVM support improvements: constraint features, SVA, type parameters, and fork fixes
body:
## Summary

This PR adds several features and fixes to improve UVM compatibility in Verilator. These changes enable compilation of UVM testbenches including mbits-mirafra UART VIP with full UVM package.

### Randomization Enhancements
- **Unique constraints**: `unique {a, b, c}` constraint expansion
- **Soft constraints**: `soft` constraint modifier support
- **Disable soft**: `disable soft` constraint modifier
- **Dist constraints**: Range checking in randomization context
- **##0 delays**: Zero cycle delay support (immediate execution)

### Class/Type Parameter Fixes
- **Inherited type parameters**: Fix for derived classes using inherited type parameters (e.g., `class my_driver extends uvm_driver#(my_tx)` can now use REQ/RSP)
- **Virtual interface triggers**: Fixed "Did not find virtual interface trigger" error for concrete interface accesses

### SVA/Assertion Features
- **Property if/else** (IEEE 1800-2017 16.12): `property p; if (cond) seq1 else seq2; endproperty`
- **Range cycle delays**: `##[min:max]` parsing (simplified to min value)
- **first_match()**: Basic support for `first_match(sequence)` operator
- **Implication with sequences**: `|->` with sequence expressions on RHS
- **Disable iff with sequences**: Allow sequence expressions in disable iff

### Interface/Fork Fixes  
- **V3MemberMap fix**: Duplicate declaration error for multiple procedures in interfaces
- **V3Fork static variables**: Static variables in interface tasks with timing control no longer cause "VarRef missing VarScope pointer" error
- **V3Name null check**: Fix segfault when compiling with complex include paths

## Test plan

- [x] All 178 class tests pass
- [x] All 27 fork tests pass
- [x] All 54 randomize tests pass
- [x] All 59 assertion tests pass
- [x] New test cases added for each feature
- [x] mbits UART VIP + full UVM compiles successfully (425 modules, 2521 C++ files)
- [x] UART VIP simulation executable builds (30.245 MB)

## New Tests Added

| Test | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `t_randomize_unique.py/v` | Unique constraint expansion |
| `t_randomize_soft.py/v` | Soft constraints |
| `t_randomize_disable_soft.py/v` | Disable soft modifier |
| `t_randomize_dist.py/v` | Dist constraint range checking |
| `t_delay0.py/v` | ##0 delay support |
| `t_class_param_inherit.py/v` | Inherited type parameters |
| `t_assert_prop_if.py/v` | Property if/else |
| `t_fork_static_iface.py/v` | Static variables in interface tasks |
| `t_uvm_driver_seq.py/v` | UVM driver/sequence pattern |

## Note

This PR bundles multiple related UVM compatibility improvements. If preferred by maintainers, these can be split into separate PRs:
1. Randomization features (unique, soft, dist)
2. Type parameter fixes
3. SVA/assertion features
4. Fork/interface fixes
